sentences.english: Last night I stayed up until midnight to finish a book.
sentences.korean: 어젯밤 책을 끝내려고 자정까지 깨어 있었어요.

sentences.english: The story was so exciting that I could not stop reading.
sentences.korean: 이야기가 너무 흥미진진해서 읽는 걸 멈출 수 없었어요.

sentences.english: This morning I was very sleepy at school.
I almost fell asleep during math class.
I will try to go to bed earlier tonight.
sentences.korean: 오늘 밤에는 더 일찍 자려고 노력할 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Trolley Problem and Moral Intuition
